case_title: JOHN LIN VS. MODERN MODE HOLDING, LLC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED NOV-27-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MODERN MODE HOLDING, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-13-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,841.85 FILED BY LIN, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT MODERN MODE HOLDING, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-13-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIN, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT MODERN MODE HOLDING, LLC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIN, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MODERN MODE HOLDING, LLC. $6,841.85 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,931.85 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
